wine_retailers.name: Prés Wine Bar and Store
wine_retailers.speciality: 100-plus Tokaj-Hegyalja wines; bottles and by-the-glass; seasonal cheese and charcuterie
wine_retailers.description: The leading independent wine shop in Tokaj town, with a curated selection of 100-plus Hegyalja wines. Walk-in retail plus bar; wine lessons and guided tastings available.

wine_retailers.name: Tokaj-Hétszőlő Wine Shop
wine_retailers.speciality: Organic Hétszőlő estate wines; local balsam vinegar and grape-seed oil; books on Tokaj
wine_retailers.description: Retail shop above the Rákóczi cellars operated by Tokaj-Hétszőlő Organic Vineyard. Stocks the full biodynamic estate range plus local artisan food products; walk-in glass pours available.

wine_retailers.name: Disznókő Wine Boutique
wine_retailers.speciality: Disznókő estate wines from 1992 vintage; books on Tokaj wine region; seasonal opening
wine_retailers.description: On-estate boutique at Disznókő stocking the complete range including back vintages to 1992. Seasonal opening June to September daily; books about Tokaj wine alongside Furmint, Aszú, among others.

wine_retailers.name: Royal Tokaji Cellar Door Shop
wine_retailers.speciality: Royal Tokaji portfolio including single-vineyard Furmint and Aszú; Eszencia; appointment required
wine_retailers.description: Cellar door shop at Royal Tokaji's Mád winery. Stocks the full portfolio from dry Furmint to Eszencia; cellar visits available by appointment; export to over 30 countries.

wine_retailers.name: Barta Pince Wine Shop
wine_retailers.speciality: Barta estate wines plus curated Mád-region selection; organic and natural Furmint cuvées
wine_retailers.description: Retail shop at Barta Winery in Mád carrying the estate's organic Furmint range and a curated multi-producer selection from Tokaj-Hegyalja. Staff can advise on local cellar visits and accommodation.

wine_retailers.name: Mad Wine Shop
wine_retailers.speciality: Mad Wine smallholder-collective range; Furmint, Hárslevelű, and Sárgamuskotály
wine_retailers.description: On-site shop for Mad Wine, the co-operative working with Mád farming families on 20 ha of volcanic-soil vineyards. Chemical-free range including dry Furmint and late-harvest styles.

wine_retailers.name: Tokajneum Online and Cellar Shop
wine_retailers.speciality: Multi-producer Tokaj wines; adjacent to World Heritage Wine Museum
wine_retailers.description: Wine retailer associated with the World Heritage Wine Museum complex on the Tisza-Bodrog confluence. Multi-producer selection spanning the Tokaj-Hegyalja; online shop with EU shipping alongside physical retail.

wine_retailers.name: Tokaj Oremus Cellar Door
wine_retailers.address: Arany János utca, Hrsz. 31/3, 3934 Tolcsva, Hungary
wine_retailers.speciality: Oremus estate wines: Mandolás Furmint, Late Harvest, Aszú; wines by Vega Sicilia's Tokaj estate
wine_retailers.description: Cellar door at Vega Sicilia's Tokaj estate in Tolcsva, selling the Oremus range from dry Furmint to Aszú. Visits by appointment include tasting of three wines; wines shipped across the EU.

verified.address_quoted: Tolcsva Arany János u hrsz. 31/3, 3934 Hungary

wine_retailers.name: Sauska Tokaj Wine Store
wine_retailers.speciality: Full Sauska Tokaj portfolio; sparkling, dry Furmint, and Aszú
wine_retailers.description: On-site wine store in the Sauska Tokaj winery complex opened 2024, selling the full estate range. Combined with bar and Michelin-recognised Padi restaurant; panoramic terrace over the estate vineyards.

wine_retailers.name: Béres Vineyards Wine Shop
wine_retailers.speciality: Béres estate wines including late-harvest and Aszú; Erdőbénye volcanic-soil Furmint
wine_retailers.description: Estate shop at Béres Vineyards and Winery in Erdőbénye, selling the full range of dry and sweet Tokaj wines. Anthony Gall-designed visitor complex with outdoor event space; multiple award-winning wines.
